steps.title: [vegetarian tacos] Results from Allrecipes
steps.vlm_low_detail_summary: TAGS: page_type=search_results; modal=no; error_banner=no; focus=center | recipe cards for vegetarian tacos, pagination buttons, Allrecipes branding

evidence.claim: The run consists of a single step on an Allrecipes search results page for vegetarian tacos, and the action taken is `send message to user: '[EXIT]'` rather than interacting with the page to find recipe ingredients or preparation details.
The task was to find the answer to 'What are the ingredients and a brief description of the preparation method?'
The screenshot summary indicates the page was a search results page with recipe cards and pagination, which suggests the needed recipe details were not yet extracted before the run exited.

args.expected_behavior: Continue navigating/searching until the recipe ingredients and a brief preparation description are identified and returned to the user.
args.actual_behavior: The run exited immediately after reaching a search results page, without extracting the requested recipe information.
args.regression_rule: Do not terminate a task on a search results page when the user asked for content from a recipe; continue to open a relevant result and collect the ingredients and preparation summary before ending.
